item.title: Dr Agarwals Health Care Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Momentum
item.description: Dr Agarwals Health Care Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its long-term strength amid challenging market conditions. Time: Mar 16 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 16 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: V2 Retail Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: V2 Retail Ltd, a prominent player in the Garments & Apparels sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum despite its strong historical performance. Time: Mar 16 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Alchemist Corporation Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.28.99
item.description: Alchemist Corporation Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Commodity Chemicals sector, reached a significant milestone today by hitting a new 52-week high of Rs.28.99. This marks a notable surge in the stock’s momentum, reflecting strong market activity and technical strength despite a flat one-year performance relative to the broader Sensex. Time: Mar 16 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Bharti Airtel Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Bharti Airtel Ltd (Stock ID: 468567), a leading player in the Telecom - Services sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, indicating deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's near to medium-term outlook. item.title: JMG Corporation Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.6.63

item.title: Medplus Health Services Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Medplus Health Services Ltd has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential bullish breakout and a shift in long-term momentum for the small-cap retailing company, despite its current Mojo Grade of Sell and recent day-to-day volatility. Time: Mar 16 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Shree Rama Newsprint Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Shree Rama Newsprint Ltd has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development often signals a potential bullish breakout, indicating a shift in long-term momentum and a possible trend reversal for the micro-cap Paper, Forest & Jute Products company. Time: Mar 16 2026 06:00 PM IST
